PAGE 2

WELCOME TO OUR FAMILY

         Welcome aboard OUTbounder!
         Whether you are one of our incredible alumni wearing a silver lanyard
         and sporting a five-timer jacket or a newbie joining us for the first
         time, we are thrilled to welcome you aboard in Lisbon!

         This is going to be an incredible trip full of fun, new friends and
         memories that will last a lifetime. There’s nothing better than
         exploring the world with our amazing LGBTQ+ family.

         As we set sail through the magical Iberian Peninsula, keep in mind
         that this trip only happened because of YOU! It’s you and your
         commitment to the dream of OUTbound that makes these fantastic
         trips happen. We can’t begin to tell you how grateful we are for your
         love, support and enthusiasm.

         Thank you for being such an important part of this amazing family.

         Welcome aboard OUTbounder!




PAGE 3

GET READY ALREADY
    Review Your Boarding Documents
    A valid passport is required for all guests. Your passport must match the information you provided when
    registering for your cruise.

    Please note that you must have all necessary documentation before boarding the ship. Failure to provide
    proper and valid documentation will result in denied boarding, and no refund will be provided.


    Visa Requirements
    While most guests from the United States, Canada and Australia do not require a visa for this itinerary,
    guests from other nations are responsible for any necessary visas and should confirm requirements with
    the appropriate embassies for the countries we’re visiting on our cruise.

    EU Entry and Exit System (EES)
    US, Canadian and Australian citizens will need to go through the EU’s new Entry and Exit System when
    traveling to a Schengen Area country. This applies to any visits lasting up to 90 days within a 180 day period.

    Your fingerprints, facial image, passport details, and entry and exit dates will be collected upon entry to
    an EES country and stored digitally. You do not need to pay a fee to enter the Schengen Area or the EU.
    The new system will be introduced gradually, and no advanced action is required.

    There is no online application, advanced registration, or fee required. The EES is a biometric border
    control system that replaces traditional passport stamping. You will complete your EES registration in-
    person at a self-service kiosk or border desk the first time you enter a Schengen Area country.


    Register Your Cruise Online With Azamara
    Make sure you have registered your cruise online with Azamara at Azamara.com.

    Registering only takes a few minutes and will ensure you can embark quickly. By now you should have received
    an email with your Azamara registration number and instructions on how to register your cruise. Please
    contact our office at 916.683.1000 or reservations@iamOUTbound.com if you do not have this email.

    Please note that each stateroom has only one Azamara registration number. If your spouse, partner or guest
    staying in the same room with you did not receive their email, please know that they need to use the same
    booking number as you for their registration.

    If you have any questions or issues with accessing your booking, please call Azamara directly at
    855-292-6272 Reservations/Customer Service
    800-556-8208 Groups
    Hours:		         Monday thru Friday 8:00am to 8:00pm Central Standard Time
    		               Saturday		            9:00am to 2:00pm Central Standard Time

PAGE 4

WHAT TO KNOW BEFORE YOU GO
    Flights
    If you’re flying into Lisbon on the day our ship departs, allow enough time to arrive at the pier before
    embarkation. Since our cruise begins in Lisbon and ends in Barcelona, many OUTbounders are booking a
    multi-city ticket, flying into Lisbon (LIS) and home from Barcelona (BCN).

    Since our ship sails at 5:00pm, we do not recommend any flights arriving in Lisbon after 12:00pm on
    Sunday, August 30th.

    If you are leaving us in Barcelona, we will begin disembarking at approximately 7:00am. We do not
    recommend any flights departing Barcelona before 12:00pm.

    Airport transfers in both Lisbon and Barcelona can be arranged through Azamara’s website where you
    book your ‘Transfer Requests’.


    Dress Code Onboard
    You’ll find a casual, comfortable atmosphere with no specified dress code on board an OUTbound cruise.
    Sportswear and casual resort attire are always appropriate. There are no formal nights and no need for
    a jacket and tie. We only request that you show good taste and respect for your fellow OUTbounders
    during dinners. That means no gym-like tank tops, gym shorts or super-revealing party outfits in the main
    restaurant Discoveries or either specialty restaurant, Prime C or Aqualina.

    Feel free to ‘take it down a notch’ if having dinner in the Windows Café or the Patio Grill where gym shorts
    and tank tops are more appropriate.


    What to Pack
    Plan for warm, even hot weather as we sail through Portugal, Spain, Gibraltar and the Balearic Islands on
    our Spanish Treasures Cruise. We recommend loose, comfortable cotton and other lightweight clothing.
    Don’t forget a hat!

    In the evenings, expect warm temperatures with lighter breezes, especially in port and on deck. All of
    our ports are very relaxed and don’t have dress codes. We suggest casual resort wear and a great pair of
    walking shoes for the tours. Daytime at sea is the time for swim wear and flip flops. Bring sunblock!


     Currency
    Our ship operates in U.S. Dollars. We recommend using a credit card if possible and always selecting
    the “local currency” option at each port to avoid transaction fees. Most of our ports on this cruise use
    Euros, while Gibraltar uses the Gibraltar Pound and British Pound Sterling. Keep in mind that Visa and
    MasterCard credit cards are widely accepted throughout the countries we will visit, but American
    Express may not be. We recommend carrying a small amount of cash for tipping and short taxi rides.


PAGE 5

BOARDING OUR SHIP
    Getting to the Port in Lisbon
    Our ship, the Azamara Quest, is scheduled to sail from...

    		Lisbon Santa Apolónia Cruise Terminal
    		Av. Infante Dom Henrique Armazém B, Loja 8
    		1900-264 Lisboa, Portugal

    The port is about a 30 minute drive from Lisbon International Airport, depending on traffic. Taxis and
    Ubers are the best ways to get to our ship from the airport.

    You can also arrange your airport transfers with Azamara on their website on the ‘Transfer Requests’ page.

    If you are staying with us at our host hotel as part of our pre-cruise package, your transfers from our hotel
    to the ship are included. Watch for an email with your transfer voucher and departure time.

    * Keep in mind our departure dock is subject to change. Please check back before arriving in Lisbon
      for the most current docking information.


    What Do I Need to Check In?
    Since you have already registered your cruise online with Azamara, you will only need your passport to
    check in for your cruise and a credit card to have on file for any additional onboard expenses you incur
    during our trip.


    Lost Luggage Assistance
    If your luggage does not arrive with you, please do all the following:

         1. Get a complete report from the airline, including your luggage’s original bag receipt and tracking
            number. Make sure that you tell the airline that you are boarding the Azamara Quest.

         2. Upon arrival on the ship, go immediately to Guest Services, where they will make a copy of your lost
            baggage report. The ship will attempt to track your luggage and follow up directly with the airline.

         3. Be patient. Depending on the airline, it might arrive prior to sailing. Our port agents will attempt
            to deliver any lost luggage directly to your room in concert with the ship. If your luggage does not
            arrive, they will keep you informed with the latest news from your airline.

    Please understand that neither OUTbound nor Azamara has lost your luggage. We can only assist you
    in recovering your luggage from the airline and in communicating with them. Ultimately, the airline is
    responsible for any loss or inconvenience you encounter. However, in our experience, most bags turn up
    in the first 48 hours.



PAGE 6

YOUR CRUISE
    Itinerary
    Date                                  Port         Arrive    Depart
    Sunday, August 30                     Lisbon		5:00pm
    Monday, August 31                     Portimão    8:00am     5:00pm
    Tuesday, September 1                  Seville    10:30am     9:30pm
    Wednesday, September 2                Gibraltar   1:00pm    10:00pm
    Thursday, September 3                 Day at Sea
    Friday, September 4                   Ibiza       8:00am     5:00am
    Saturday, September 5                 Majorca    12:00pm     7:00pm
    Sunday, September 6                   Barcelona  10:00am  disembark




    Theme Nights
    Neon Glow Party Sunday
    Light up our first night onboard in your brightest neon and get ready to shine. From electric pinks to
    glowing greens, this theme is all about bold color, big energy, and turning heads on the dance floor.

    Sundresses & Sangria Party Monday
    Slip into something light, bright, and ready for the afternoon golden hour on the Pool Deck. This breezy
    theme is all about easy afternoon summer style, warm-weather charm, and feeling relaxed, radiant, and
    ready for fun.

    OUTbound’s Blue & White Night Tuesday
    An OUTbound favorite inspired by our signature colors and the timeless shades of the Mediterranean.
    Think crisp whites, bold blues, and effortless vacation style that always feels fresh, polished, and
    unmistakably OUTbound.

    Flamenco Red Night Thursday
    Turn up the passion in your favorite shades of red, from sleek and sultry to bold and fiery. Inspired by
    the dramatic color and unmistakable energy of Spain, this is your night to make an entrance!

    Slumber Soirée Saturday
    Get cozy and come dressed for the chicest sleepover at sea. From classic pajama sets to silky robes
    and playful bedtime looks, this theme is all about comfort with a stylish twist for our final night onboard.




PAGE 7

ENTERTAINMENT & EVENTS
    Sunday Lisbon
    Sail Away Welcome Toast & Five Timer Jacket Presentation on the Pool Deck
    We’re kicking things off with something very special, recognizing this year’s group of inductees into our
    Five Timers Club with our OUTbound Five Timer Jacket presentation! We’re here today because of
    you, and we can’t wait to raise a glass in your honor during our welcome toast on deck!

    Solo OUTbounder Mixer in the Living Room
    One of the best things about an OUTbound cruise is how quickly strangers become friends. Our Solo
    OUTbounder Mixer gives guests traveling on their own a space to meet, mingle, and connect in a
    relaxed setting before the week really gets going.

    Alec Mapa Comedy Show in the Cabaret Lounge
    Get ready for a night of laughs with Alec Mapa, an award-winning actor, comedian, and fan favorite
    known for his fearless humor and unforgettable stage presence. With credits including Ugly Betty,
    Desperate Housewives, RuPaul’s Drag Race, and multiple stand-up specials, Alec brings sharp wit, big
    personality, and nonstop entertainment to the stage!



    Monday Portimão

    Pub Quiz - LGBTQ+ History in the Living Room
    Test your gay knowledge and flex those trivia muscles. From Stonewall to sapphic poets, see who really
    knows their LGBTQ+ legends.

    Back to Back OUTbounders Mixer in the Living Room
    Sailing with us for both weeks? Join us for our Back-to-Back Mixer, a special get-together for
    OUTbounders continuing on for the second sailing. It’s a great chance to connect with fellow back-
    to-back guests, share your excitement for the epic two-week adventure ahead, and kick off our trip
    together!

    BROLESQUE in the Cabaret Lounge
    Get ready for BROLESQUE, an all-male dance-theatre revue that brings together commercial
    choreography, camp, and theatrical storytelling in one electrifying performance. With bold ensemble
    work, dynamic solos, and character-driven moments, the show explores desire, identity, freedom, and
    connection in a way that is both theatrical and unforgettable.

    An Evening with Miss Bouvèé in the Living Room
    Get ready for a night of sultry Southern charm and live cabaret magic! Miss Bouvèé, Detroit’s dazzling
    drag sensation, for an unforgettable evening of powerful vocals, side-splitting comedy, and pure
    entertainment.




PAGE 8

ENTERTAINMENT & EVENTS
    Tuesday Seville
    Tapas & Tunes - Divas in the Living Room
    Join us for a flavorful celebration of the divas we love most! We’ll be serving delicious bites and a
    soundtrack full of powerhouse vocals, iconic hits, and unforgettable energy. Grab a plate, sip something
    tasty, and settle in for a fabulous gathering inspired by the queens of the playlist.

    OUTbound Alumni Mixer in the Living Room
    Calling all OUTbound alumni! This is your chance to reconnect with old friends and make new ones
    at our special alumni mixer. Share your favorite cruise moments, plan future adventures, and immerse
    yourself in the vibrant colors of the OUTbound community.

    Flag Parade & Azamara Singers on the Pool Deck
    Enjoy a poolside buffet during our Blue & White Night. Cheer on the crew during the vibrant Flag
    Parade, and dance the night away as the Azamara Singers deliver LGBTQ+ classics and power anthems
    under the stars.

    Karaoke After Dark in the Living Room
    The stars aren’t the only ones shining tonight… it’s your time to grab the mic! After our dreamy Blue &
    White Night, keep the party going with Karaoke After Dark. Whether you’re belting Broadway, slaying
    some Céline, or giving Cher her moment, this is your stage diva.



    Wednesday Gibraltar

    OUTbound’s Drag Brunch in Discoveries Restaurant
    It’s not just brunch, it’s a spectacle! Hosted by the one and only Miss Bouvèé, with a special
    performance by KiKi Ball-Change & Effie Passero! Come for the mimosas, stay for the wigs and wit!

    Lady OUTbounder Mixer in the Living Room
    Raise a glass and join us for our Lady OUTbounder Mixer, a special gathering for the women who make
    OUTbound what it is. Come make new friends, share stories, and enjoy a relaxed moment with your
    fellow Lady OUTbounders

    Azamara Singers Broadway Baby in the Cabaret Lounge
    Get ready for a night of Broadway magic with Azamara’s signature singers. Featuring iconic musical
    theater hits and dynamic live performances, this show is sure to strike a chord with theater lovers and
    casual fans alike.




PAGE 9

ENTERTAINMENT & EVENTS
     Thursday Day @ Sea

     OUTbound New Trip Reveals in the Cabaret Lounge
     The wait is over! Join us for the highly anticipated OUTbound New Trip Reveals, where we’ll announce
     our brand-new, must-see trips for 2027, 2028 and beyond. Be the first to discover where our next
     adventures will take you, and start planning your future trips with your fellow OUTbounders!

     Win A Cruise Bingo with Cruise Director Jose in the Cabaret Lounge
     Get ready for a fabulous time with our cruise director Jose! Expect big laughs, fierce competition, and
     fabulous prizes that will have you on the edge of your seat. Come for the laughs, stay for the fun... and
     the chance to win your next cruise with us. This is bingo like you’ve never seen before!

     Pub Quiz - RuPaul’s Drag Race in the Living Room
     Do you know your Sasha Velour from your Symone? Can you name every All Stars winner and the lip
     sync assassin they slayed? Sashay your way to this RuPaul’s Drag Race showdown and prove you’re the
     ultimate queen of trivia. No tea, no shade... just points.

     Tea Dance Pool Party with BROLESQUE on the Pool Deck
     Bring the rainbow realness and let loose! Our afternoon pool party turns up the volume with Pride
     anthems, colorful drinks, and an electric poolside performance by BROLESQUE!

     Are You Having Any Fun? with KiKi Ball-Change in the Living Room
     Two-time Best Cabaret Award winner and drag sensation Kiki Ball-Change brings her signature mix
     of live vocals, comedy, and musical mayhem to the stage. Expect big laughs, bigger notes, and a wildly
     entertaining show that’s equal parts hilarious, chaotic, and unforgettable.

     VERSatility with Jose in the Cabaret Lounge
     A high-octane show that hilariously blurs the lines between musical genres and queer culture. They say
     being versatile is a rare gift, and he’ll prove he can handle any position (musically speaking, of course).
     Come for the vocal gymnastics, stay for the cheeky charm, and leave wondering... is there anything this
     Latin boy can’t do?




PAGE 10

ENTERTAINMENT & EVENTS
     Friday Ibiza
     Themed Trivia - Classic Gay Quotes in the Living Room
     Join us in the Living Room for a themed round of trivia celebrating some of the funniest, fiercest, and
     most unforgettable quotes from LGBTQ+ icons, film, television, and pop culture. Bring your best one-
     liners, test your knowledge, and get ready for a lively evening full of laughs, nostalgia, and just the right
     amount of friendly competition.

     Shawn Pelofsky Comedy Show in the Cabaret Lounge
     Join us for a night of comedy with Shawn Pelofsky, an internationally performing stand-up comedian
     and regular at The Comedy Store, The Laugh Factory, and the Improv. With major television credits
     including writing experience for Joan Rivers on Fashion Police, Shawn is sure to bring the laughs
     onboard!


     Saturday Majorca
     Tapas & Tunes - Way Bitchin’ 80s in the Living Room
     It’s radical, it’s retro, and it’s ready to party. Continue your OUTbound adventure with big hair, big beats,
     and dancing to your favorite 80s anthems.

     A Night with Effie Passero in the Cabaret Lounge
     Effie is a powerhouse vocalist and virtuoso pianist who first captured national attention on TV’s
     American Idol. Classically trained in operatic vocals and now touring the UK and Europe as a lead
     performer with the sold-out Postmodern Jukebox, Effie brings world-class talent, dynamic stage
     presence, and unforgettable energy to every performance.

     A Fond Farewell with Miss Bouvèé in the Living Room
     We never say “Goodbye”, only “See You Next Time”. Miss Bouvèé is here to serenade you with your
     favorite anthems, take your requests, and sprinkle a little extra glitter on our final night. It’s the perfect
     “Until We Meet Again” before we sail off into the sunset… and onto our next OUTbound adventure
     together!




PAGE 11

ONBOARD THE QUEST
     Extended Service Hours
     Creating our own world onboard means writing our own rules. With the help of our incredible cruise
     partners at Azamara, we have arranged for extended service hours for some of our more popular
     spaces and services. Below are the extended service hours created just for our OUTbounders!


       GYM		                SPA / SAUNA       POOL / HOT TUBS
     		 6:00am to 10:00pm		 9:00am to 11:00pm  24 Hours
     						* with limited closures for cleaning



     Dining Times
     Fresh ingredients, careful preparation and a variety of menu choices. Azamara offers a choice of six
     distinctive dining options, including room service. Whether you’re a fan of haute cuisine or down-
     home cooking, expect the same delicious quality. Bon appétit! Buon appetito! ¡Buen provecho! No
     matter how you say it, you’re in for a real treat.
